nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose orchestration file for the CI environment, defining all external service dependencies (databases, message brokers, connectors) used in integration and end-to-end tests.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Multi-stage Dockerfile building the `risingwave-build-env` image on Ubuntu 24.04 with the full Rust toolchain, Node.js, Python, buf CLI, cargo-nextest, cargo-llvm-cov, and other CI tools required to compile and test RisingWave.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a single named stage (risingwave-build-env) and configures dumb-init as the entrypoint to handle signal rewriting in containers.
